title: TDD prompt satisfied in outcome: one-behavior-per-test unit suite across all layers
evidence: queries_test.go(24), server_test.go(11), loader_test.go(6), normalize_test.go(6) — 47 Test funcs, each asserting a single behavior; fixture-based testDB() in queries_test.go:7
suggestion: none — incremental test-first structure is evident in the resulting suite

title: Test coverage 78.7% with all query capabilities exercised
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.787 (build+tests pass); 47 unit tests, 0 skipped (grep t.Skip => 0)

title: json.Unmarshal errors ignored in tool argument decoding
evidence: server.go:213,260,305,355,400,435 — `json.Unmarshal(args, &p)` return value discarded; malformed arguments silently yield zero-value params
suggestion: check the error and return an invalid-params JSON-RPC error on malformed tool arguments

title: Standings team-alias mapping is hardcoded
evidence: normalize.go:96-146 teamGroupKey hardcodes ~20 short-name -> state-bearing aliases; teams not in the switch are grouped only by raw normalized name
suggestion: derive aliases from the data or document the limitation; unlisted teams appearing both with and without a state suffix may split into two standings rows

title: Date-range filter relies on lexical string comparison of normalized dates
evidence: queries.go:49-54 compares m.Date < p.StartDate as strings; parseDate (normalize.go:82-91) returns the raw unparsed string on failure, which would compare incorrectly against YYYY-MM-DD bounds
suggestion: exclude or flag matches whose date failed to normalize before applying a range filter
